title: Taxi Dubrovnik to Tribunj | Fixed €520 Transfer | TAXI Antonio
description: Private taxi and transfer from Dubrovnik to Tribunj. Fixed €520 per car, up to 4 passengers, door to door. Book direct with Antonio.
keywords: taxi dubrovnik to tribunj, transfer dubrovnik to tribunj, dubrovnik to tribunj taxi, dubrovnik to tribunj transfer

schema.name: Taxi Dubrovnik to Tribunj
schema.description: Private, fixed-price taxi and transfer from Dubrovnik to Tribunj, 520 euros per car for up to 4 passengers, door to door.

offers.description: One-way private transfer from Dubrovnik to Tribunj, per car for up to 4 passengers. Return 1040 euros.

mainEntity.name: How much is a taxi from Dubrovnik to Tribunj?

acceptedAnswer.text: A fixed 520 per car for up to 4 passengers, one way, with tolls, fuel and luggage included. A return trip is 1040.

mainEntity.name: Is the transfer private or shared?

acceptedAnswer.text: Every transfer is private and door to door, in a Škoda Superb. No vehicle sharing and no extra stops unless you ask for them.

mainEntity.name: Can you stop along the way?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. On the longer routes I am happy to stop for a coffee, a photo or a quick sight. Just let me know when booking.

mainEntity.name: How far in advance should I book?

acceptedAnswer.text: At least 2 hours ahead so I can confirm the car and your pickup time. For a sooner ride, call or WhatsApp me directly.
